<!--
Research report PR. Open with: ?template=research.md
The research pack drops a report under src/content/research/<locale>/<slug>.md
and opens this PR. CI validates the schema/build automatically; the boxes
below are the human + review-council gate before merge (see site-pack 17).
-->

## Report

- Slug:
- Locale(s): <!-- en / zh -->
- Title:

## Review gate (must all be checked before merge)

- [ ] **Completion receipt** — deliverable present, claims backed
- [ ] **Citations sealed** — every source content-hashed; no unread/altered source cited
- [ ] **Peer review** — independent review-council pass recorded
- [ ] **Human check** — a person read it end to end (`reviewed.humanCheck` set to name/date)
- [ ] **Original value** — has data / analysis / a tool that isn't available elsewhere
- [ ] **Honest boundaries respected** — no claim that can't survive due diligence
- [ ] **Bilingual + hreflang** — if shipping both locales, slugs match
- [ ] `draft: false` only when all the above are true

## Notes
